ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisites for the course */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Link to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was last updated */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "learning_objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives for the topic */,
  "number_of_lectures" INTEGER /* Number of lectures or sections covering the topic */,
  "section_numbers" TEXT /* Section numbers in textbooks or reference books */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisites for the topic */,
  "additional_resources" TEXT /* Links to additional resources for the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lectures" (
  "lecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lecture */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the lecture belongs to */,
  "lecture_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lecture */,
  "lecture_title" TEXT /* Title of the lecture */,
  "lecture_date" TEXT /* Date the lecture was given */,
  "lecture_notes" TEXT /* Notes for the lecture */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the lecture video */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the lecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lecture was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lecture was last updated */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the lecture in minutes */,
  "quiz_link" TEXT /* Link to the quiz related to the lecture */,
  "assignment_link" TEXT /* Link to the assignment related to the lecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lectures_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was last updated */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study of the student */,
  "academic_advisor" TEXT /* Name of the academic advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the enrollment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student accessing the material */,
  "lecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lecture being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("lecture_id") REFERENCES lectures ("lecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "textbooks" (
  "textbook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each textbook */,
  "textbook_name" TEXT /* Name of the textbook */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the textbook */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the textbook */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the textbook was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the textbook */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the textbook record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the textbook record was last updated */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the textbook */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the textbook (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("textbook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_textbooks" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "textbook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the textbook */,
  "section_numbers" TEXT /* Section numbers in the textbook or reference book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_textbooks_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_textbooks_textbook_id FOREIGN KEY ("textbook_id") REFERENCES textbooks ("textbook_id")
)
